## createDisposables() function

Disposables allow adding of disposal async functions, when dispose is called, these functions will be run sequentially

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export declare function createDisposables(): {
    dispose(): Promise<void>;
    add(disposable: Disposable): void;
};
```
<b>Returns:</b>

{ dispose(): Promise&lt;void&gt;; add(disposable: [Disposable](./data-structures.disposable.md)<!-- -->): void; }
